privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). The target case name is 'Evidence_Packaging_2024' with case number 'INV-EXT-007'. The required disk image path is '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. The output files and directories expected by the verifier are the extraction directory at '/home/ga/Reports/extracted_evidence', the manifest file at '/home/ga/Reports/evidence_manifest.txt', and the packaging summary at '/home/ga/Reports/packaging_summary.txt'. All metadata claims perfectly match the evaluation scripts and task instructions.
